title: Manhunt Compass
description: A small manhunt mod that adds the compass and the ability to track players and mobs
body: you can get a compass by running /compass get you can use the compass by running the command /compass set while holding the Manhunt Compass and it will show the last known location which for players updates while in the same dimension the compass will return to you apon death if one is in your inventory please note this mod automaticly sets the locator_bar game rule to false
